title: Shujing: Marquis of Lu on Punishments
source: Old Text and New Text recensions
description: From the Shujing (Book of Documents) — the foundational Chinese historical text, recording the speeches of legendary sage-kings.
introduction: From the Shujing (Book of Documents) — the foundational Chinese historical text, recording the speeches of legendary sage-kings.

translation.text: The king said: 'I cherish the same anxiety as Yu had. Now, listen, you officers, to the discourse on punishments. Concerning the punishments to be inflicted, I have heard that they ought to be redeemable by fines.'
